message:
fix(transport): count gap-skip symbol in reorderer delivery metrics

When a symbol arrives with a sequence gap exceeding max_sequence_gap,
the reorderer flushes buffered symbols and delivers the trigger symbol.
The buffered symbols were counted as timeout_deliveries, but the
trigger symbol itself was not counted in any delivery metric, causing
in_order + reordered + timeout < total delivered.

Count it as in_order_deliveries since it becomes the new epoch's first
expected symbol after the gap reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
